head.text: Lyssophobia; fear of becoming mad. Emotion and bad news aggravate; also, thinking of fluids. Hypersensitiveness of all senses. Chronic headache. Boring pain in forehead

mouth_throat.text: Constant spitting; saliva tough, viscid. Sore throat; constant desire to swallow, which is difficult; gagging when swallowing water. Froths at mouth

male.text: Lascivious; priapism, with frequent emissions. No emission during coition. Atrophy of testicles. Complaints from abnormal sexual desire

female.text: Uterine sensitiveness; conscious of womb (Helon). Feels prolapsed. Vagina sensitive, rendering coition painful (Berberis). Uterine displacements

respiratory.text: Voice altered in tone. Breathing held for a time. Spasmodic contraction of respiratory muscles

stool_rectum.text: Desire for stool on hearing or seeing running water. Profuse, watery stools, with pain in bowels; worse, evening. Constant desire to urinate on seeing running water

worse_from.text: sight or sound of running water or pouring water, or even thinking of fluids; dazzling or reflected light; heat of sun; stooping

keynotes.text: color="#800000">LYSSINUM Lyssin-Saliva of Rabid Dog (HYDROPHOBINUM) Affects principally the nervous system; aching in bones. Complaints from abnormal sexual desire. Convulsions brought on by dazzling light or sight of running water.
